title: Statement from UC Academic Senate Chair Ahmet Palazoglu on review of UC admissions
snippet: The Academic Senate's comprehensive review of the University's undergraduate admissions policies will align with the Board of Regents' timeline to deliver a policy recommendation on the use of standardized tests in admissions by the end of the 2026–27 academic year... The goal of this A-G policy review is to consider how UC defines and evaluates college readiness in a rapidly changing educational
match_reason: websearch (position_statement) — Ahmet Palazoglu, Co-Chair of the UCOP AI Steering Committee and Academic Senate Chair, issued this statement on admissions policy reviews, which are directly responding to the widespread adoption of AI and AI-assisted writing tools.
